headline: VICI Properties Inc. Announces Sale-leaseback of Canadian Portfolio in Connection With Pure Casino Entertainment’s Acquisition of Gamehost

headline: VICI Properties Inc. Announces Release Date for First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: NEW YORK, March 30, 2026--VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE: VICI) ("VICI Properties" or the "Company") announced today that it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, April 29, 2026 after the close of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. The Company will host a conference call and audio webcast on Thursday, April 30, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time (ET).

content.title: VICI Properties Inc. Announces Release Date for First Quarter 2026 Results
content.summary: NEW YORK, March 30, 2026--VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE: VICI) ("VICI Properties" or the "Company") announced today that it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, April 29, 2026 after the close of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. The Company will host a conference call and audio webcast on Thursday, April 30, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time (ET).

headline: VICI Expands Canadian Casino Portfolio While Shares Screen As Undervalued
summary: VICI Properties (NYSE:VICI) plans to acquire real estate assets in Alberta, Canada tied to Pure Casino Entertainment's purchase of Gamehost Inc. The deal adds new Canadian gaming and hospitality properties to VICI's triple net master lease portfolio. The transaction expands VICI's existing master lease with Pure Casino by increasing annual rent and extending lease terms. The acquisition is expected to be immediately accretive upon closing and marks VICI's first portfolio transaction in...
